title: OOB, zero-size and huge-padding hostile gate

contract.threshold: canonical finite number from 0 through 100 inclusive
contract.padding: canonical safe integer from 0 through 16384 inclusive
contract.persistedParity: StudioProjectV1 validation now rejects every crop value refused by the processing protocol and crop stage.
contract.geometry: Cells require positive integer dimensions and complete containment in a budgeted positive source.
contract.rejectionOrder: Invalid geometry is rejected before cancellation callbacks or pixel scans.
contract.maximumPadding: Padding 16384 clamps to the original cell and cannot read or emit pixels outside that cell.

propertyGate.content: one opaque pixel at a seeded position in each valid cell
propertyGate.expected: local bounds equal the complete cell; source bounds remain positive and in-bounds; packed output length is exact

cellBounds: origin at source width or height

boundary: G4-01 owns chroma color, tolerance, smoothness and spill processing plus visual goldens.
